factor_name_zh: 结构函数振幅因子（tau=20, s=20）
short_desc_en: A slower-horizon Structure Function variability signal kept to show how the astronomy-inspired idea extends toward a short-to-medium timescale family.
short_desc_zh: 一个较慢尺度的 Structure Function 时域变异性信号，用来展示该天文思路如何延伸成短中周期家族。

description.motivation_en: Tau=20 pushes the same idea to a slower horizon. The goal is not to create a new champion, but to see how far the same Structure Function logic can stretch before it fades.
description.motivation_zh: tau=20 把同一条思路继续推向更慢的时间尺度。它的目标不是再造一个主冠军，而是看看 Structure Function 这条线往外延伸时还能保留多少意义。
description.construction_en:
Again the form stays the same, with the lag extended to $\tau=20$:

$$SF_t(20)=\frac{1}{20}\sum_{i=0}^{19}(r_{t-i}-r_{t-i-20})^2$$

This makes tau=20 a natural extension of the tau=5 and tau=10 results rather than a separate construction.
description.construction_zh:
形式仍然不变，只是固定滞后继续扩展到 $\tau=20$：

$$SF_t(20)=\frac{1}{20}\sum_{i=0}^{19}(r_{t-i}-r_{t-i-20})^2$$

因此 tau=20 更像是 tau=5 和 tau=10 的自然延伸，而不是另一种完全不同的构造。
description.interpretation_en: I treat tau=20 as family evidence. It shows that the SF idea can still say something at a slower horizon, even though the strongest result remains on the shorter lags.
description.interpretation_zh: 我更把 tau=20 当成家族证据来看。它说明 SF 这条线在更慢的时间尺度上仍然有研究意义，只是最强结果还是落在更短的滞后上。

analysis_note_en: Tau=20 matters because it makes the whole SF family easier to trust. The result says this is a scalable line of thought, not just a single setting that happened to work once.
analysis_note_zh: tau=20 的价值，在于它让整个 SF 家族更可信。它说明这不是一个偶然有效的参数点，而是一条可以沿时间尺度展开的研究思路。
